name: Hash Brown Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes well and cut into 1/3-inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a large non-stick pan over medium heat.
3. Add the potato cubes, diced green bell peppers, salt, and black pepper to the pan.
4. Cover and cook for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally until the potatoes are cooked through and crisp.
5. Stir in the chopped chives before serving.
Food Exchange per Serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 68; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 11g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 115mg; FAT: 2g.
